category_sources: source_facts.description says CFML embedded server, package manager, and app scaffolding; official README describes CFML CLI, package manager, embedded CFML server, REPL, and scaffolding.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is commandbox; official product page and GitHub README use CommandBox.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links the latest installation, usage, development docs at commandbox.ortusbooks.com and Command API docs at apidocs.ortussolutions.com.
repo_sources: Official CommandBox GitHub repository is linked from the Ortus product ecosystem and README identifies it as CommandBox source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe CFML/ColdFusion, package management, embedded server, app scaffolding, REPL, and CLI use.
